vllm.title: expand coverage of gpt2 models
vllm.author: twaka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Thanks for the amazing project!
I noticed some gpt2 models have different naming of weights from https://huggingface.co/gpt2
For example, DialoGPT-small and mGPT are saved in a way that transformer. prefix is already prepended and also masked_bias is saved.
transformer.wte.weight
transformer.wpe.wei

vllm.title: [Setup] Check CUDA_HOME instead of cuda.is_available() in setup.py
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is to solve #177
The issue is when building a docker image, torch.cuda.is_available() always shows False even CUDA_HOME is available. This seems normal to me because you don't need GPUs but just CUDA (or nvcc).
With this change, I could use the following Dockerfile to build an image:
FROM nvcr.
